5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/intervalMower" attribute "tooltip" uses key "Range_1" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.worx/blob/master/package.json)
